description: 科技行业扩展 ontology，覆盖 SaaS 产品、平台工程、DevOps、AI/ML、云基础设施和技术团队管理
description_en: Technology industry extension covering SaaS products, platform engineering, DevOps, AI/ML, cloud infrastructure, and engineering team management

classes.definition: 以技术产品或平台为核心业务的企业
classes.definition_en: An enterprise with technology products or platforms as its core business

classes.definition: 负责产品研发和技术交付的工程组织单元
classes.definition_en: An organizational unit responsible for product development and technical delivery

classes.definition: 以订阅模式交付的云端软件即服务产品
classes.definition_en: Cloud-based software-as-a-service product delivered via subscription model

classes.definition: 为开发者或企业提供基础能力的平台类产品，如 API 平台、数据平台、AI 平台
classes.definition_en: Platform products providing foundational capabilities, e.g., API platforms, data platforms, AI platforms

classes.definition: 对外暴露的应用程序编程接口端点
classes.definition_en: An externally exposed application programming interface endpoint

classes.definition: 独立部署和扩展的细粒度服务单元
classes.definition_en: A fine-grained service unit that can be independently deployed and scaled

classes.definition: 在公有云或私有云上运行的计算、存储和网络资源
classes.definition_en: Compute, storage, and networking resources running on public or private cloud

classes.definition: 从数据源采集、转换和加载到目标系统的自动化数据流程
classes.definition_en: Automated data flow from ingestion, transformation, to loading into target systems

classes.definition: 训练后用于预测或分类的机器学习模型资产
classes.definition_en: A trained machine learning model asset used for prediction or classification

classes.definition: 敏捷开发中固定时间窗口的工作迭代，通常 1-4 周
classes.definition_en: A fixed time-box work iteration in agile development, typically 1-4 weeks

classes.definition: 描述产品新功能或改进需求的结构化工单
classes.definition_en: A structured ticket describing a new product feature or enhancement request

classes.definition: 影响服务可用性或性能的生产环境异常事件
classes.definition_en: An abnormal production event affecting service availability or performance

classes.definition: 将代码变更发布到生产环境的操作事件
classes.definition_en: An operational event releasing code changes to the production environment

classes.definition: 因短期妥协积累的代码质量问题，增加未来维护成本和系统故障风险
classes.definition_en: Code quality issues accumulated from short-term compromises, increasing future maintenance cost and failure risk

classes.definition: 系统中可被利用的安全弱点，如代码漏洞、配置错误、依赖库漏洞
classes.definition_en: Exploitable weaknesses in systems, e.g., code vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, dependency CVEs

classes.definition: 负责产品战略、路线图和需求优先级的角色
classes.definition_en: A role responsible for product strategy, roadmap, and requirement prioritization

classes.definition: 设计、编写和维护软件代码的技术角色
classes.definition_en: A technical role designing, writing, and maintaining software code

classes.definition: 负责系统可靠性、可观测性和自动化运维的工程角色
classes.definition_en: An engineering role responsible for system reliability, observability, and operational automation

classes.definition: 构建和维护数据管道、数据仓库和数据湖的技术角色
classes.definition_en: A technical role building and maintaining data pipelines, warehouses, and data lakes

classes.definition: 定义服务可用性、响应时间和故障恢复承诺的策略
classes.definition_en: Policy defining service availability, response time, and recovery commitments

classes.definition: 从代码提交、自动构建、测试到自动部署的持续集成和交付流程
classes.definition_en: Continuous integration and delivery pipeline from commit, build, test to automated deployment

classes.definition: 从故障检测、分级、处置、恢复到事后复盘的应急响应流程
classes.definition_en: Emergency response from detection, triage, mitigation, recovery to post-mortem review

classes.definition: 快速迭代和交付高质量软件产品的组织能力
classes.definition_en: Organizational capability to rapidly iterate and deliver high-quality software products

classes.definition: 集成日志、指标和链路追踪的系统运维监控平台
classes.definition_en: Monitoring platform integrating logs, metrics, and distributed tracing

classes.definition: 服务在线正常运行时间占总时间的比率，通常以 99.9%+ 为目标
classes.definition_en: Ratio of service uptime to total time, typically targeting 99.9%+

classes.definition: 单位时间内向生产环境发布代码的次数
classes.definition_en: Number of code releases to production per unit time

classes.definition: 从故障发生到服务恢复的平均时长
classes.definition_en: Average duration from incident occurrence to service recovery

classes.definition: SaaS 产品每月的订阅经常性收入
classes.definition_en: Monthly subscription recurring revenue for SaaS products

classes.definition: 一定期间内停止使用产品或取消订阅的客户比率
classes.definition_en: Rate of customers who stop using the product or cancel subscriptions in a period

relations.definition: 科技公司设有工程团队
relations.definition_en: A tech company has engineering teams
An engineering team develops a product

relations.definition: 产品暴露 API 接口

relations.definition_en: A platform is composed of microservices

relations.definition: 微服务运行在云基础设施上
relations.definition_en: A microservice runs on cloud infrastructure

relations.definition: 数据管道训练 ML 模型
relations.definition_en: A data pipeline trains an ML model

relations.definition: 需求在迭代中计划和交付
relations.definition_en: A feature request is planned and delivered in a sprint

relations.definition: 微服务通过 CI/CD 流程部署
relations.definition_en: A microservice is deployed via the CI/CD process

relations.definition: 部署可能触发故障事件
relations.definition_en: A deployment may trigger an incident

relations.definition: 故障由应急响应流程处理
relations.definition_en: An incident is resolved through the incident response process

relations.definition: 微服务由可观测性平台监控
relations.definition_en: A microservice is monitored by the observability platform

relations.definition: SaaS 产品受 SLA 策略约束
relations.definition_en: A SaaS product is governed by an SLA policy
